title: Correlate Audit Record Review, Analysis, and Reporting
description: Correlate audit record review, analysis, and reporting processes for investigation and response to indications of unlawful, unauthorized, suspicious, or unusual activity.

checks.name: Log Forwarding to Centralized System is Configured
checks.purpose: Verify Windows Event Forwarding (WEF) or a SIEM agent is configured to send logs to a central correlation platform

checks.name: Audit Logs Include Sufficient Detail for Correlation
checks.purpose: Confirm log entries include timestamp, user, source IP, event type, and outcome fields required for cross-system correlation

checks.name: Log Forwarding to Centralized System is Configured
checks.purpose: Verify Windows Event Forwarding (WEF) or a SIEM agent is configured to send logs to a central correlation platform

checks.name: Audit Logs Include Sufficient Detail for Correlation
checks.purpose: Confirm log entries include timestamp, user, source IP, event type, and outcome fields required for cross-system correlation

checks.name: SIEM or Log Aggregation Tool is Present and Active
checks.purpose: Verify a SIEM agent (e.g., Splunk UF, Elastic Agent, NXLog) is installed, running, and communicating with the central log server

checks.name: Log Forwarding to Centralized System is Configured
checks.purpose: Verify rsyslog, syslog-ng, or audisp-remote is configured to forward logs to a central SIEM or log aggregator

checks.name: Audit Logs Include Sufficient Detail for Correlation
checks.purpose: Confirm auditd records include auid, uid, gid, pid, timestamp, syscall, and result fields to support cross-system correlation

checks.name: SIEM or Log Aggregation Agent is Present and Active
checks.purpose: Verify a SIEM agent (e.g., Filebeat, Splunk UF, Elastic Agent) is installed, running, and shipping logs to the central platform

checks.name: Log Forwarding to Centralized System is Configured
checks.purpose: Verify rsyslog, syslog-ng, or audisp-remote is configured to forward logs to a central SIEM or log aggregator

checks.name: Audit Logs Include Sufficient Detail for Correlation
checks.purpose: Confirm auditd records include auid, uid, gid, pid, timestamp, syscall, and result fields to support cross-system correlation

checks.name: SIEM or Log Aggregation Agent is Present and Active
checks.purpose: Verify a SIEM agent (e.g., Filebeat, Splunk UF, Elastic Agent) is installed, running, and shipping logs to the central platform

remediation: Deploy and configure a SIEM or centralized log aggregation platform. Configure Windows Event Forwarding and Linux rsyslog/audisp-remote to ship logs. Ensure all log records contain the fields needed for cross-system correlation (user, timestamp, source, event type, result).
